title: 開運！　ラッキーテレフォン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru drags me off by the hand one
day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, today we're going mountain climbing. I
can't move mountains, but I can sure move these
legs!
choice_data_list:
Why are we going mountain climbing all of a
sudden?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well you see, I heard something through the
grapevine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you dial a certain phone number from a
mystical spot, you can earn yourself some good
luck... allegedly!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, my plan is to scale this famous spiritual
mountain and call that number!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's get to it! Neither rocks nor roots are going
to stop me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head up the mountain, though it turns out it's
not rocks or roots that we have to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Ghost
text_block_list.text:
Mwahaha! So you dare to show your face! You will
not leave this place alive!

text_block_list.name: Lingering Spirit
text_block_list.text: Save meee... Please, save meee...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ignoring the horrifying wailing, we trek onward.
This certainly is a spiritual mountain... in the sense
that it seems to be full of spirits.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're looking pretty pale, Trainer. Running low
on oxygen?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't hear what? Oh, the birds? They sound
kinda cute, huh? Chirp chirp!
choice_data_list: You're not picking up on any spirits?
You're not picking up on any spirits?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Spirits? Maybe... Maybe not. I can't really tell...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No use sweating the details though! Just go with
the flow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As crazy for all things spiritual as she is, it doesn't
look like she has even a hint of a sixth sense.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Phew. All right, I guess this spot will do.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's not waste any time. Now, where's that lucky
number?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
M-my goodness! Just as I was getting ready to
dial, my phone started ringing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! What if this call is coming from the lucky
number?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm, maybe it's best to pick up? We are on a
lucky mountain, after all. We can't get any
unlucky calls here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not as optimistic, seeing what's been lurking
up here. Time to make a decision.
choice_data_list: Go ahead and pick it up.
I don't think you should answer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Hehe, I guess the owner of this lucky
number just couldn't resist giving me a ring.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hi, is this Luck E. Pearson speaking?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No, this is Taiki Shuttle.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, Taiki... My phone shows this as an
unknown number. Are you using a pay phone or
something?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You see, I was just about to call this number that
brings you happiness.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
A number that brings you happiness? The heck is
that? Wait...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You sure you ain't got your boots on backwards?
'Cause I've only heard of numbers that'll curse ya
if ya call 'em. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Cursed numbers... Really? Wait... Could it be that
I heard wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: T-Taiki, I-I'm gonna hang up now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer... This can't be...
choice_data_list: I think you got it wrong.
I think you got it wrong.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eeeyikes! I don't want to be cursed! Save meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru hurtles down the mountain at
a pace that would leave a marathon runner pale
and wheezy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, you two. Where were you guys?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? I told you before when we
were talking on the phone.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Anyway, thanks for the heads-up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you hadn't told me about that cursed number
thing, I would've been in a real pickle.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What heads-up? What're you talking about? We
didn't talk on the phone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know what I'm talking about, silly! You called
me earlier... on a pay... phone...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But why would you do that when you've got your
own phone right... there? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just who was it that called? Whoever it was, all
that running around on the mountain seems to
have done Fukukitaru some good.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But, why? I don't see any reason not to answer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait! That sound...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hey, my screen's cracked!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That can't be a good sign... I'm sensing that
something bad is about to happen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-wh-what if this is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her about all the sinister things I saw on the
mountain.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ugwah! I-I had no idea! Eek, somebody heeelp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru books it down the mountain
as fast as she can.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, listen to this. I actually talked it over with
Taiki afterwards...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, that phone number wasn't lucky at
all. It was cursed.
choice_data_list: Did your phone take the hit for you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Looks like it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, thank you, my sweet phone. May you rest
in perfect peace. And also...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
May your repairs go quickly. It's really
inconvenient without you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess she's going to pretend her phone isn't
cursed and keep using it.
